content.json:
# ${workbook_display_name}

Month-to-date Azure OpenAI spend, p50/p95/p99 latency per cohort scenario, daily token-count trend, and kill-switch status for the dedicated golden-cohort deployment.

**Cap:** $${monthly_budget_usd}/month. **Warn:** ${warn_threshold_percent}% of cap. **Kill:** ${kill_switch_threshold_percent}% of cap (Q15-conditional rule).

Read-only. Editing requires the cohort-ops role on the Azure subscription. Runbook: `docs/runbooks/GOLDEN_COHORT_REAL_LLM_GATE.md`.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'golden_cohort_mtd_usd'
| summarize MtdUsd = max(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Month-to-date spend (USD) — golden cohort Azure OpenAI

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name in ('golden_cohort_latency_p50_ms','golden_cohort_latency_p95_ms','golden_cohort_latency_p99_ms')
| summarize avg(value) by name, scenario = tostring(customDimensions['scenario'])
| order by scenario asc
content.title: Per-scenario latency (p50/p95/p99 ms)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'golden_cohort_token_count'
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Daily token-count trend

content.json:
## Tile sources

- **Cost tile** uses Azure Cost Management `ActualCost` with `MonthToDate` timeframe, filtered to the cohort `Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts` resource. Numbers are projected into App Insights `customMetrics` by `scripts/golden_cohort_budget_probe.py` (workflow `.github/workflows/golden-cohort-nightly.yml`).
- **Latency tiles** read from `customMetrics` rows emitted by the .NET cohort tests (`GoldenCohortRealLlmGateTests`) when `ARCHLUCID_GOLDEN_COHORT_LATENCY_REPORT_PATH` is set.
- **Kill-switch banner** reflects `tests/golden-cohort/budget.config.json` and is enforced at PR-merge time by `scripts/ci/assert_golden_cohort_kill_switch_present.py` (Q15-conditional rule).
